response_constraints: Do not claim any result not established by a tool response.
Keep each call's result separate; do not transfer identifiers or fields between calls.
Report the retrieved record, availability result, and filtered list as distinct findings.
state_assertions: Persistent simulator state is unchanged by the read-only calls.

stages.purpose: Call crm_get, crm_availability, and crm_list together; every argument is user-supplied, so no call consumes another call's result.

prompt: For the account review, run three independent read-only checks in one assistant action: retrieve crm-269; check whether "Dovetail Arts Collective" is available on 2026-08-16 in West; and list active accounts in West. Do not create, update, cancel, or notify any record. Report only the requested findings; do not infer or take a follow-up action.
